response.justification: Bogdan brings strong staff-level seniority and TypeScript expertise with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP—directly relevant to the role. However, the position requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and his AI experience appears nascent (1 month into current role). Critical gaps include no Python background (listed as primary language), no demonstrated expertise with vector databases or RAG architectures, and minimal evidence of production AI system design or data pipeline work. He has the engineering fundamentals and senior leadership capability to potentially grow into the role, but lacks the proven AI/ML depth the position demands.
strengths: Staff-level seniority with 15+ years of software development experience and proven leadership across multiple senior roles
Direct MCP and AI-agent infrastructure experience in current role at re:cinq, including agentic workflows and developer tooling
Strong TypeScript and full-stack engineering foundation with AWS CDK, microservices, and software craftsmanship expertise (TDD, testing)
concerns: No Python experience listed despite it being a primary language requirement; background is JavaScript/TypeScript-dominant
AI experience appears very recent (1 month in current role) with no demonstrated track record of building production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG systems, or LLM optimization
No evidence of data pipeline or data engineering expertise, particularly for structured/unstructured data processing required for AI infrastructure

key_factors.factor: Recent AI infrastructure exposure but unproven production AI depth
Python language gap against core requirements
